title: Dropping default value definitions from a table does not work as expected
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown', age INTEGER DEFAULT 18, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, NULL AS name, age FROM test_table;
ALTER TABLE temp_table RENAME TO test_table;
key_bug_features: Dropping default values from table columns fails
